how.name: Browse Cars
how.description: Explore verified listings and filter by model, price, and condition to find your ideal vehicle.

how.name: View Details
how.description: Check specifications, images, and seller information before making a decision.

how.name: Contact Seller
how.description: Reach out directly via WhatsApp for transparent and fast communication.

how.name: Agree on Price
how.description: Negotiate fairly and finalize terms with confidence and clarity.

how.name: Inspect Vehicle
how.description: Verify condition through physical inspection or trusted mechanics.

how.name: Complete Transaction
how.description: Finalize payment and drive away with your new vehicle.
